title: Pouvoirs pakistanais
text_preview: FULL POWER, WHEREAS Muhammad Nawaz Khan who was constituted and appointed as Plenipotentiary and Representative having Full Power and Authority to sign the Commonwealta - French War Graves Agreement on behall of Pakistan left Paria before the Agreement was signed, the sald Full Powers in favour of Muhammad Nawaz Khan were transferred to S.K. pages.text:
FULL POWER,

WHEREAS Muhammad Nawaz Khan who was constituted and appointed as Plenipotentiary and Representative having Full Power and Authority to sign the Commonwealta - French War Graves Agreement on behall of Pakistan left

Paria before the Agreement was signed, the sald Full

Powers in favour of Muhammad Nawaz Khan were transferred to S.K. Dahlavi.

IN WITNESS whereof I have signed these Fresents and affixed hereto my seal.

Done at Karacht this 30!

day of November

In the year one thousand, nine hundred and fiftyone.

Solo hashaned

Governor-General of the Dominion

of Pakistan.
